Document route

Live Proof V3

Dedicated additive hardening proof for Governance V3 and Settlement V3 on Devnet.

Document context

Devnet proof only; not a mainnet custody claim.

Audience: Judges, reviewers, protocol operators

Try in productOpen verification routeOpen generated proof
Open raw file

Test Wallet Live Proof V3

This packet captures two real Devnet flows executed with local test-only wallets outside git:

  • `Governance Hardening V3` with token-supply quorum and a dedicated reveal rebate vault
  • `Settlement Hardening V3` with a proposal-scoped settlement snapshot, REFHE settlement, and verified settlement evidence

Context

  • generated at: `2026-04-09T15:06:53.614Z`
  • mode: `test-wallet-devnet-proof-v3`
  • operator wallet: `4Mm5YTRbJuyA8NcWM85wTnx6ZQMXNph2DSnzCCKLhsMD`
  • program id: `5AhUsbQ4mJ8Xh7QJEomuS85qGgmK9iNvFqzF669Y7Psx`

Purpose

This artifact proves that the repository now carries a real Devnet proof for both `Governance Hardening V3` and `Settlement Hardening V3`. It is still a test-wallet Devnet artifact, not a production-custody or mainnet claim.

Related next docs

Agentic Treasury Micropayment Rail

Operational brief for DAO-controlled micropayment batches, showing how approved policy becomes batched stablecoin settlement with judge-visible runtime proof and telemetry continuity.

Reviewer Fast Path

Shortest reviewer path across live proof, V3 hardening, trust links, and launch boundary surfaces.

Reviewer Telemetry Packet

Generated reviewer-visible route into telemetry, hosted reads, runtime evidence, indexed governance, and the infrastructure value layer behind PrivateDAO.

PrivateDAO is a privacy-focused governance and treasury product on Solana with additive hardening, runtime evidence, and clear verification surfaces.
Developed in public through github.com/X-PACT/PrivateDAO with product proof, runtime evidence, and final security hardening moving in parallel.
